ecarx.carext.vehicle

Class VehicleAreaWheel

  • java.lang.Object
    • ecarx.carext.vehicle.VehicleAreaWheel

  • public final class VehicleAreaWheel
extends java.lang.Object
    Object used to indicate area value for car properties which have area type VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_WHEEL.

    The constants defined by VehicleAreaWheel indicate the position for area type VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_WHEEL. A property can have a single or a combination of positions. Developers can query the position using ICarManager.getAreaId(int, int).

    Refer to ICarConfig.getAreaIds() for more information about areaId.
